markdownRemark.html: Hey there! I'm Amit Friedberg. Welcome to my portfolio! In the past decade (or more) I have been a Full Stack Web Developer. I'm passionate about crafting web application development and partnering with ambitious startups to build the next generation of intelligent web applications. My development philosophy centers on leveraging the full potential of the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem—especially Node.js and React—while embracing the transformative power of AI-Driven Coding. I thrive on architecting intelligent, high-performance web products and intuitive user experiences by strategically guiding AI tools to amplify creativity and efficiency. My expertise spans a comprehensive tech stack including React, Vue, Node.js, Express/Nest.js, TypeScript, Styled-Components, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and modern UI frameworks like Tailwind/ChakraU. always with a focus on robust Software Architecture and methodologies like Atomic Design. Explore my projects to see how I blend deep technical skill with a forward-looking approach. Let's collaborate and shape the future, together!
